title: Disney Pluto — tears closed and restuffed
description: Pluto arrived with holes and flat stuffing. We deep cleaned, patched the tears, and restuffed so the plush is firm for display or play.
itemDetails: Disney Pluto plush is officially licensed Mickey universe merchandise, produced across many decades by Disney Store and approved partner manufacturers. Pluto's design has remained consistent, making tag/date cues important for pinpointing release era. Most versions use polyester plush with embroidered or appliqued facial details and soft fill suited to child handling.
repairDetails: This Disney Pluto plush had holes and tears through the pile. We deep cleaned the fabric, repaired the tears, and restuffed Pluto so he keeps his shape. Before and after photos in this folder show the condition on arrival and the finished plush.
